title: Red Hat Security Advisory: buildah security update
overview:
An update for buildah is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS (v. 10.0)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: buildah security update

An update for buildah is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for buildah is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
buildah-1.39.5-1.el10_0.src.rpm
buildah-1.39.5-1.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
buildah-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
buildah-debugsource-1.39.5-1.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.39.5-1.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
buildah-tests-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
buildah-1.39.5-1.el10_0.s390x.rpm
buildah-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.s390x.rpm
buildah-debugsource-1.39.5-1.el10_0.s390x.rpm
buildah-tests-1.39.5-1.el10_0.s390x.rpm
buildah-tests-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.s390x.rpm
buildah-1.39.5-1.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
buildah-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
buildah-debugsource-1.39.5-1.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
buildah-tests-1.39.5-1.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
buildah-tests-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
buildah-1.39.5-1.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
buildah-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
buildah-debugsource-1.39.5-1.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.39.5-1.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
buildah-tests-debuginfo-1.39.5-1.el10_0.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-52881: A flaw was found in runc. This attack is a more sophisticated variant of CVE-2019-16884, which was a flaw that allowed an attacker to trick runc into writing the LSM process labels for a container process into a dummy tmpfs file and thus not apply the correct LSM labels to the container process. The mitigation applied for CVE-2019-16884 was fairly limited and effectively only caused runc to verify that when we write LSM labels that those labels are actual procfs files.
